notes: Official SICM summer-camps announcement and 2026 registration page reviewed May 16, 2026. Building photo is the museum’s staff-uploaded Wikimedia Commons image (CC BY-SA 4.0), downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.

Weekly themed camps run June 29–September 4, 2026 per the official summer-camps post; individual theme weeks and availability are listed on the registration portal.
Listing is distinct from the museum’s general drop-in admission listing (prov-staten-island-childrens-museum).
rating and reviewCount are 0; not published on these official pages.

document.name: Staten Island Children's Museum — Summer Camp 2026
document.shortDescription: Snug Harbor day camp with themed weeks (STEAM, cooking, superheroes): full day 9 a.m.–4 p.m., half-day option ages 4–5, and exhibit access while closed to the public.
document.longDescription:
The Staten Island Children’s Museum announced its Summer 2026 camp schedule on its official summer-camps page, with registration linked at sichildrensmuseum.org/2026-summer-mini-camps/. Camps run June 29 through September 4 with ten themed weekly options for ages 4–8 in a hands-on environment on the Snug Harbor campus.

Published rates on that page: Full Day Camp (ages 5–8), 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m., $100 per day ($80 for members) or $450 per five-day week ($360 for members). Half Day Kindergarten Option (ages 4–5), 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m., $55 per day ($44 for members) or $247.50 per five-day week ($198 for members). Extended care is available 8:00–9:00 a.m. and 4:00–5:30 p.m. for $15 per session per camper.

The announcement highlights STEAM, cooking, and superhero themes; visual and performance arts; exclusive daily exhibit access while the museum is closed to the public; outdoor play on Snug Harbor grounds; and weekly live performances. Museum contact on the same page: 718-273-2060, info@sichildrensmuseum.org, 1000 Richmond Terrace, Staten Island, NY 10301.

Sources: https://sichildrensmuseum.org/summer-camps/ https://sichildrensmuseum.org/2026-summer-mini-camps/ https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Staten_Island_Children%27s_Museum.jpg
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists themed weeks June 29–Sept 4 with full-day, half-day, and extended-care options—register at sichildrensmuseum.org.
